Vincent La

Software Engineer

Scottsdale, AZ 🌵

I am a software engineer who believes the primary goal of technology is to solve real-world problems and improve people's lives.

I build fast, reliable, end-to-end solutions using C++, C#, Python, React, and PostgreSQL.

When I’m not coding, you’ll find me mountain biking, four-wheeling, or exploring the Arizona backcountry.
